title: Introducing Lyria 3 Pro
summary: Google DeepMind announced Lyria 3 Pro, an advanced music generation model that enables custom creation of tracks up to 3 minutes long with creative control and customization. The model represents an improvement over the previously introduced Lyria 3 and is being integrated into more Google products.
